tasks.title: Clarify nginx -t vs reload vs restart
tasks.body: Figure out what `nginx -t` actually validates, and when to use reload vs restart.

tasks.title: SSH authorized_keys + permission checklist
tasks.body: When copying a public key into `authorized_keys`, also set permissions (home/`.ssh`/keys — typically 700/700/600) or auth fails silently.

tasks.title: UFW: open web ports without locking out SSH
tasks.body: Allow 80/443, keep 22 open, then enable UFW so you don't lock yourself out.

tasks.title: Certbot nginx cert + confirm renewal timer
tasks.body: `certbot certonly --nginx -d example.com`. Renewal is a cron/timer — check with `systemctl list-timers | grep cert`.

tasks.title: Clean dead Docker containers carefully
tasks.body: `docker ps -a | grep dead`, then prune only if careful about volumes.

tasks.title: Pick one Node version manager on laptop
tasks.body: Choose among asdf / nvm / mise for Node; stop reinstalling Node globally with brew every time.

tasks.title: Clarify Docker EXPOSE vs publish (-p)
tasks.body: Relearn the difference between Dockerfile `EXPOSE` and publishing ports with `-p`.

reference.title: tmux quick keys
reference.body: Ctrl-b d detach; Ctrl-b c new window; Ctrl-b % split.

reference.title: Postgres dump/restore for large DBs
reference.body: Dump with `pg_dump -Fc`, restore with `pg_restore -d ...`. Avoid plain SQL dumps for big databases.

reference.title: Compose depends_on ≠ healthy
reference.body: `depends_on` does not wait for healthy unless you set a condition.

reference.title: YouTube link in dump (rickroll)
reference.body: https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ — Rick Astley, Never Gonna Give You Up (classic rickroll). Likely a placeholder/joke in the scrap pile.

articleCandidates.title: Permissions that look fine but break SSH/nginx
articleCandidates.why: Explicit article idea in notes; pairs with the authorized_keys silent-fail tip (700 home, 700 .ssh, 600 keys, plus SELinux/AppArmor footnote).
